title: besseya rubra
intro: Besseya rubra, also known as the red bessia or red bessie, is a flowering plant species native to the northwestern United States and western Canada. This perennial herb belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties. Besseya rubra contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are said to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these health benefits.
